prompt: Create a surreal cinematic square image in a vast alien sandy wasteland. In the foreground, a Japanese schoolgirl with straight black shoulder-length hair and bangs sits on pale rippled sand, leaning back on one hand with her knees bent, wearing a white short-sleeve sailor-style school blouse, dark plaid skirt, red bow tie, white socks, and black loafers. Beside her sits a large fleshy humanoid alien creature, about twice her mass, with a pale beige wrinkled amphibian body, squat seated posture, long arms resting on its belly, wide splayed bare feet, a vertical slit-like mouth running down the front of its head and torso, and exactly two tall eye stalks with round glossy eyeballs looking forward. The girl looks sideways toward the creature with a quiet curious expression while the creature faces the viewer calmly. Surround them with an eerie desert of soft dunes containing many smooth rounded pebble-like eggs and stones, plus exactly two tall lollipop-shaped alien plants in the midground. Add distant low mountains, a striped cliff formation on the right, and a moody cloudy blue-gray sky. Use muted pastel colors, soft diffused lighting, shallow cinematic depth of field, realistic photo-surreal texture, 1980s Japanese sci-fi film atmosphere, slightly grainy analog film look, centered composition, no text, no watermark. Optional customization: set the subject as Japanese schoolgirl with straight black shoulder-length hair and bangs, the creature as large pale beige wrinkled humanoid alien with two eye stalks and a vertical slit mouth, the environment as pale rippled alien sandy wasteland with rounded egg-like stones, the mood as quiet eerie cinematic curiosity, and the style as realistic photo-surreal 1980s Japanese sci-fi film still.
